scripts.dev:super-admin: npm run db:generate && npm run dev --workspace=@sh/super-admin
scripts.dev:guru: npm run db:generate && npm run dev --workspace=@sh/guru
scripts.dev:siswa: npm run db:generate && npm run dev --workspace=@sh/siswa
scripts.dev:orang-tua: npm run db:generate && npm run dev --workspace=@sh/orang-tua
scripts.vercel-build:super-admin: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace=@sh/super-admin
scripts.vercel-build:guru: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run build --workspace=@sh/guru
scripts.vercel-build:siswa: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run build --workspace=@sh/siswa
scripts.vercel-build:orang-tua: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace=@sh/orang-tua
scripts.db:init: npm run env:check && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed && npm run db:backfill-notifications
scripts.db:update: npm run env:check && npm run db:backup-excel && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:backfill-notifications
scripts.db:update:no-backup: npm run env:check && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:backfill-notifications
